summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept independent; unavailable refs are scoped needs_human due missing live kind/updated_at from the preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, merge plans, close plans, security routes, or fix artifacts are recommended.

actions.reason: Independent open PR in this inventory shard; no duplicate, superseding PR, or close-safe canonical is established.
Independent focused PR; no shared canonical or closure basis exists in this inventory job.
Independent command behavior fix; inventory evidence does not establish duplication or supersession.
Independent feature/hardening PR; not a security report under the provided artifact and no close-safe canonical exists.
Independent large feature PR; no duplicate/superseded relationship is proven in the inventory shard.
Independent bug fix PR; no closure or merge action is allowed or fully preflighted in this plan job.
Independent candidate needing proof repair or maintainer review outside this non-mutating inventory plan.
Independent PR with failing validation; no duplicate, supersession, or close-safe canonical is established.
Independent Slack feature PR; dirty-candidate label alone is not sufficient for closure under this job.
Independent sessions CLI feature PR; no inventory evidence supports closeout.
Independent diagnostics config PR; no duplicate or superseding candidate is identified.
Independent draft PR with failing proof; keep for author/maintainer follow-up rather than close from inventory.
Independent plugin bug fix PR; partial check enrichment gap blocks merge but not conservative classification.
Independent heartbeat bug fix PR; insufficient basis for close or merge in this plan shard.
Independent memory/dreaming bug fix PR; keep classified without mutating action.
Independent broad feature PR. It is not routed as security because the artifact marks no security-sensitive signal, but it is not close-safe or merge-ready.
Independent broad feature/design PR with validation and review concerns; not appropriate for inventory closeout.
Independent maintainer-review PR; clean mergeability alone is not enough for a merge recommendation in plan mode.
Cannot safely classify or plan any mutation without live kind/state/updated_at from the artifact.
Unavailable live state makes the specific classification decision unresolved.
Cannot decide the item from the artifact without live kind/state/updated_at.
Specific item requires fresh hydration before classification.
Cannot classify this ref safely without hydrated live state.
Specific item needs rehydration before classification or any planned mutation.
Unavailable live state blocks this item-specific classification.
